prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约8744名、6553名、5609名、22965名（2024年出现断档异常）、5347名（2025年恢复至正常区间）。2021-2023年呈逐 年上升趋势（位次数字减小），2024年因断档大幅下滑，2025年迅速回升至5347名，接近2023年水平，显示该校在山西省物理类考生中竞争力强劲且稳定；该校 在山西省物理类（含原理科）招生计划：2021年179人、2022年184人、2023年178人、2024年173人、2025年189人、2026年179人。2026年较2025年减少10人（缩招约5.3%） ，缩招意味着录取名额减少，对位次有上推压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京交通大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第41名，近年排名稳定在40-43名区间， 属于国内顶尖211高校，办学层次和综合实力突出；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及实验室爆炸火灾等校园安全事件，可能对部分考生及家长的报考意愿产生 轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第45位（较热），短视频平台曝光量中等偏上，整体关注度尚可。未见明显投档断档记录（2024年断档属个别年份异常）；系统科学A+ （全国第一）、交通运输工程A、信息与通信工程A、计算机科学与技术A-、土木工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共6个A类学科。其中计算机类、电子信息类、交通运输类等招生专业 对应优势学科，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续高热（2024-2026年均为高热推荐），与北交大优势学科 高度契合，推高相关专业组竞争。山西省2026年物理类考生167419人，较2025年173347人减少约3.4%，考生总数下降部分缓解竞争压力。2026年。北京交通大学位于北京市，属一线城市高校，对山西省考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在山西省招生规模较大（物理类约179人），属该校在省外的主要生源省份之 一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5347名、2026年缩招5.3%对位次的上推压力、物理类考生减少3.4%对竞争的缓和作用、声誉偏负面带来的轻微抑制，以及优势学科与热 门专业（计算机、电子信息）的持续吸引力，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅上移（位次数字增大，竞争略加剧）。预测最低位次约5207名，波动区间4707-5707名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 8744, 6553, 5609, 22965 (an anomaly in 2024 due to a gap), and 5347 (returning to normal range in 2025). From 2021 to 2023, there was an upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), but in 2024, due to the gap, there was a significant drop, and in 2025, it quickly rebounded to 5347, close to the 2023 level, indicating strong and stable competitiveness among physics category candidates in Shanxi Province. The enrollment plan for physics category (including former science category) in Shanxi Province: 179 in 2021, 184 in 2022, 178 in 2023, 173 in 2024, 189 in 2025, and 179 in 2026. In 2026, there is a decrease of 10 compared to 2025 (a reduction of about 5.3%), which means fewer admission slots, exerting upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 41st, with a stable ranking in the 40-43 range in recent years, making it a top-tier 211 university with outstanding institutional level and comprehensive strength. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents such as laboratory explosions and fires, which may mildly suppress the willingness of some candidates and parents to apply. It ranks 45th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms, indicating decent overall attention. No obvious admission gaps have been observed (the 2024 gap was an anomaly for that year). It has 6 A-level disciplines: Systems Science A+ (first in the country), Transportation Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, and Management Science and Engineering A-. Among these, majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Transportation Engineering correspond to advantageous disciplines, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have consistently high social popularity (highly recommended from 2024 to 2026), aligning well with BJTU's advantageous disciplines, thus increasing competition for related major groups. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shanxi Province is 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, which partially alleviates competition pressure. In 2026, Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has strong regional appeal to Shanxi candidates. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Shanxi (about 179 in physics category), making it one of its main source provinces outside Beijing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5347, the upward pressure on rankings from a 5.3% enrollment reduction in 2026, the mitigating effect on competition from a 3.4% decrease in physics category candidates, the mild suppression from a slightly negative reputation, and the sustained appeal of advantageous disciplines and popular majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information), it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly increase (ranking number increases, competition slightly intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5207, with a fluctuation range of 4707-5707.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With a predicted ranking in the range of 4707-5707, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Transportation Engineering, Automation, Electrical Engineering) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Zhan Tianyou Class, Computer Science, Electronic Information) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Science Experimental Class, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering) as a safety net. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 4707) can aim for Tier 1 flagship majors; those with rankings near the upper end (around 5707) should prioritize Tier 2 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 1064, 1349, 1141, 6339 (an anomaly due to a gap in 2024), and 1392 (recovery in 2025). Rankings fluctuated narrowly between 1064-1349 from 2021-2023, dropped sharply in 2024 due to the gap, and quickly recovered to 1392 in 2025, indicating stable competitiveness among liberal arts/history candidates in Shanxi Province. The university's enrollment plan for history category (including former liberal arts) in Shanxi: 10 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 15 in 2024, 16 in 2025, and 13 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 3 students (a decrease of about 18.75%), which is a significant reduction and exerts upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 41st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top-tier 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (due to a laboratory safety incident), which may mildly suppress application willingness. Douyin popularity ranks 45th (relatively hot), with overall moderate attention. No history of gaps in history category admissions; Management Science and Engineering (A-) and Applied Economics (related) have some connection to history category majors (e.g., Economics and Management Pilot Class, Law), but history category majors are few (4), so the disciplinary advantages are relatively limited in attracting history category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively hot social popularity (recommended), Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, and Foreign Languages and Literature is generally wait-and-see. In 2026, Shanxi Province has 63,113 history category candidates, a significant decrease of about 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025, indicating a notable decline in total candidates and a clear easing of competition, which is an important factor pushing rankings downward (easier to enter). In 2026, Beijing, located in a first-tier city, still has strong regional appeal for history category candidates. The university's enrollment scale for history category in Shanxi is small (13 students), with a limited competitive base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1392, the upward pressure from the 18.75% enrollment reduction in 2026, the significant easing of competition due to a 25.6% decrease in history category candidates, and the mild suppression from the slightly negative reputation, the reduction in candidates far exceeds the enrollment reduction. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decrease compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases, competition slightly eases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1200, with a fluctuation range of 1020-1380.
